data.title: Meitu Announces Proposed Separate Hong Kong Listing of Investee HBN
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Meitu ( (HK:1357) ).

Meitu has disclosed that its investee company Shenzhen HBN Technology (Group) Company Limited, in which the group holds approximately a 23.81% equity interest on a fully diluted basis, has applied for a separate listing on the Main Board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. HBN, recently converted into a joint stock company, has submitted a Form A1 listing application, though details of the offer size, structure and timetable have not yet been provided, and Meitu cautioned shareholders that the proposed listing remains subject to HBN’s board decision and regulatory approval and therefore may or may not proceed, underscoring both the potential value realisation opportunity and the associated uncertainty for investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1357) stock is a Buy with a HK$10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Meitu stock, see the HK:1357 Stock Forecast page.

More about Meitu

Meitu, Inc. is a Hong Kong-based technology company incorporated in the Cayman Islands that develops and operates imaging, social and related digital services through a group structure of subsidiaries and consolidated affiliates, and is listed on the Main Board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under stock code 1357.

YTD Price Performance: 18.29%

Average Trading Volume: 52,674,365

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$37.97B

The latest announcement is out from Empiric Student Property ( (GB:ESP) ).

Empiric Student Property has granted nil-cost share options to chief executive Duncan Garrood and chief financial and sustainability officer Donald Grant under its long-term incentive and employee share schemes. Garrood received 926,809 nil-cost options and separately exercised 5,738 options at 69.7p, while Grant was awarded 97,550 nil-cost options, moves that strengthen equity-based remuneration for senior management and further align leadership incentives with shareholder value.

Listed on the premium segment of the London Stock Exchange since 2014, the company focuses on high-quality, studio-focused properties targeting more affluent student segments, which it manages through its Hello Student operating platform.

data.title: Cheelcare Wins Medicare and Medicaid Reimbursement for Companion Wheelchair Power Assist
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Cheelcare Inc. ( (TSE:CHER) ) has provided an update.

Cheelcare Inc. has secured Pricing, Data Analysis, and Coding (PDAC) verification for its Companion power assist device, making the front-mounted motorized add-on for manual wheelchairs eligible for reimbursement under U.S. Medicare and Medicaid. The move significantly broadens the product’s addressable market beyond Veterans Affairs, vocational rehabilitation, workers’ compensation and private-pay channels, lowering financial barriers for end-users and enabling therapists and durable medical equipment dealers to recommend and bill for the device more easily. Backed by a network of more than 300 authorized U.S. dealers, recent record sales in late 2025, and expanded manufacturing capacity at a new 16,000-square-foot facility, Cheelcare is positioning the Companion as a growth driver that could accelerate adoption, support more predictable, insurance-funded revenue streams, and advance the company’s path toward profitability in the U.S. mobility market.

More about Cheelcare Inc.

Cheelcare Inc., based in Markham, Ontario, is a Canadian designer and manufacturer of advanced mobility solutions for people with disabilities. Its portfolio includes the Companion power-assist add-on for manual wheelchairs and the Curio robotic complex-rehab power wheelchair, combining engineering-led innovation with human-centered design to improve users’ independence and quality of life.

Average Trading Volume: 17,326

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Learn more about CHER stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Bravo Mining Gains Regulatory Boost as Brazil Creates Barcarena Export Processing Zone
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Bravo Mining Corp. ( (TSE:BRVO) ) has shared an update.

Bravo Mining Corp. has welcomed a Brazilian presidential decree that formally creates the Barcarena Export Processing Zone in Pará, where its Luanga PGM+Au+Ni project has been selected as the first-ever mineral anchor tenant of a Brazilian ZPE. The new zone, located near deep-water port and energy infrastructure, solidifies the regulatory framework underpinning Bravo’s alternate development scenario, which envisions local processing and vertical integration using the ZPE’s tax and customs advantages to lower capital and operating costs and improve export competitiveness. The initiative, developed in partnership with state and federal authorities and local industry bodies, strengthens Bravo’s alignment with Brazil’s industrial and economic agenda and may unlock an additional revenue stream from sulphuric acid produced as a by-product of smelting, potentially serving a constrained local fertilizer and chemical industry where high acid prices have already forced some producers to curtail output.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BRVO) stock is a Hold with a C$5.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bravo Mining Corp. stock, see the TSE:BRVO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:BRVO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:BRVO is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and meaningful negative free cash flow), despite a conservative balance sheet. Technicals are comparatively strong with a clear uptrend and positive momentum indicators. Valuation is unattractive/less informative due to negative earnings, while recent corporate events add moderate strategic support through financing flexibility and project development progress.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:BRVO stock, click here.

More about Bravo Mining Corp.

Bravo Mining Corp. is a Canadian mining company focused on developing the Luanga palladium, platinum, rhodium, gold and nickel project in Pará state, Brazil. The company aims to advance local processing and vertically integrated production of these metals, leveraging Brazil’s industrial policy and regional infrastructure to serve global demand for platinum group metals and associated by-products.

data.title: American Eagle Extends High-Grade Copper-Gold Mineralization at NAK South Zone With Major Drill Hit
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from American Eagle Gold ( (TSE:AE) ) is now available.

American Eagle reported one of its strongest drill results to date at the NAK project’s South Zone, with hole NAK25-78 intersecting 802 metres of 0.71% copper equivalent from surface, including a 375-metre interval grading 1.01% copper equivalent beginning at 211 metres. The hole demonstrates continuous, high-grade mineralization from near surface to depth, materially expanding and linking the highest-grade portions of the South Zone, which now measures roughly 700 metres east-west, 500 metres north-south and over 800 metres vertically. These results improve geological understanding of the high-grade core, increase confidence in the continuity and scale of the system, and support the South Zone’s potential as an initial development area within the wider NAK project, guiding the design of further aggressive drilling and moving the area toward an initial resource assessment.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AE) stock is a Hold with a C$0.60 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on American Eagle Gold stock, see the TSE:AE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:AE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:AE is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, widening losses, and rising cash burn), with valuation also constrained by negative earnings. Technicals are a partial offset due to a clear uptrend above key moving averages, but overbought momentum indicators add near-term risk.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:AE stock, click here.

More about American Eagle Gold

American Eagle Gold Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on its 100%-owned NAK copper-gold project in British Columbia. The company is advancing large-scale porphyry-style mineralization, targeting high-grade copper-gold zones with potential for bulk mining and early-stage development scenarios within a broader district-scale system.

data.title: Volta Metals Reports High-Grade Gallium Hit at Springer Rare Earth Project in Ontario
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Cashbox Ventures Ltd ( (TSE:VLTA) ) has shared an update.

Volta Metals has reported initial high-grade gallium assay results from borehole SL25-23 at its Springer Rare Earth Project in Ontario, confirming a broad, continuous mineralized interval of 116.8 metres grading 77 g/t Ga2O3, with multiple higher-grade zones including a peak assay of 332 g/t Ga2O3 over one metre. The intercept, which remains open at depth with further assays pending, is described as the widest and most consistent high-grade gallium interval identified at Springer so far, reinforcing the project’s potential as a significant North American source of gallium in addition to its established rare earth mineralization. With gallium designated a critical mineral by major Western jurisdictions and global supply currently dominated by China, these results strengthen Volta’s strategic positioning in a rapidly growing market driven by semiconductors, telecommunications, defense and clean energy applications.

More about Cashbox Ventures Ltd

Volta Metals Ltd. is a Toronto-based mineral exploration company focused on critical minerals, advancing its Springer Rare Earth Project in Sturgeon Falls, Ontario. The project targets rare earth elements alongside associated strategic by-products such as gallium, positioning the company within key supply chains for high-tech, defense, telecommunications and renewable energy industries that rely on these materials.

Average Trading Volume: 192,174

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$17.8M

For an in-depth examination of VLTA stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Invesque ( (TSE:IVQ) ) just unveiled an update.

Invesque Inc. has fully redeemed its US$27.3 million 9.75% unsecured subordinated debentures, which were due December 30, 2027, and has had the debentures delisted from the Toronto Stock Exchange following the January 23, 2026 redemption. The transaction removes a relatively expensive layer of debt from Invesque’s capital structure, potentially improving its financial flexibility and cost of capital as it continues to focus on its portfolio of private pay seniors housing assets across North America.

data.title: Gushengtang to Raise US$110 Million via Premium-Priced Convertible Bonds for AI-Driven TCM Push
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Gushengtang Holdings Limited ( (HK:2273) ) has issued an announcement.

Gushengtang Holdings Limited has entered into a subscription agreement with an investor to issue US$110 million in unlisted convertible bonds under its general mandate, at an initial conversion price of HK$37.77 per share, a premium of about 22% to its recent trading prices. The deal, which does not require further shareholder approval and could result in the issuance of around 22.9 million new shares (up to roughly 8.91% of the enlarged share capital), is expected to raise net proceeds of approximately US$108.7 million for share repurchases, investment in artificial intelligence systems for traditional Chinese medicine diagnostics and health management, and general working capital, signaling both a balance-sheet optimization drive and a strategic push into tech-enabled TCM services; the company will seek Hong Kong listing approval for the conversion shares and will complete required CSRC filings.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2273) stock is a Buy with a HK$46.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Gushengtang Holdings Limited stock, see the HK:2273 Stock Forecast page.

More about Gushengtang Holdings Limited

Gushengtang Holdings Limited is a Hong Kong–listed company operating in the healthcare sector, with a focus on traditional Chinese medicine (TCM). The group’s activities include TCM medical services and related health management offerings, and it is increasingly integrating advanced technologies such as artificial intelligence into TCM diagnostics and knowledge management to strengthen its market positioning.

Average Trading Volume: 1,497,302

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

data.title: Shenghui Cleanness Adds Major Shareholder-Linked Executive to Board
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Shenghui Cleanness Group Holdings Limited ( (HK:2521) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Shenghui Cleanness Group Holdings Limited has appointed Mr. Dong Jiangang as an executive director with effect from 26 January 2026, bringing more than 16 years of management experience across water utilities, intelligent equipment, and industrial technology companies in mainland China, as well as his current leadership role at Shanghai-listed Dong Guan City Huali Industries Co., Limited. Mr. Dong, whose affiliated company is already a major shareholder of Shenghui Cleanness with an approximately 19% stake, has signed a three‑year renewable service contract, will initially receive no director’s remuneration pending review by the remuneration committee and board, and will be subject to regular retirement and re‑election, a move that further aligns the company’s board composition with a key strategic shareholder and may strengthen governance and strategic coordination between the companies.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2521) stock is a Buy with a HK$0.92 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Shenghui Cleanness Group Holdings Limited stock, see the HK:2521 Stock Forecast page.

More about Shenghui Cleanness Group Holdings Limited

Shenghui Cleanness Group Holdings Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating through a group structure and backed by a substantial shareholder, Dong Guan City Huali Industries Co., Limited, which holds about 19% of its issued shares through a wholly owned subsidiary. The group is positioned within the broader industrial and services landscape in Greater China, with governance and operations overseen by a board of directors in line with Hong Kong listing regulations.

Average Trading Volume: 10,020,475

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$1.72B

data.title: Aqua Bio Technology Calls Extraordinary Meeting to Approve Reverse Split and Capital Measures
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Aqua Bio Technology ASA ( (DE:3FZ) ) has provided an announcement.

Aqua Bio Technology ASA has called an extraordinary general meeting for 16 February 2026 in Oslo to seek shareholder approval for a 50-for-1 reverse share split and several measures to strengthen its capital structure. The agenda also includes approving a specific share capital increase, granting a broader authorization for future capital raises, updating executive remuneration guidelines, and authorizing share issuance related to an option program, moves that collectively signal active balance-sheet management and potential future financing to support the company’s operations and growth plans.

More about Aqua Bio Technology ASA

Aqua Bio Technology ASA (ABTEC) is a Norway-based technology and distribution group focused on skincare and other non-food products. The company serves both B2C and B2B markets, offering distribution, freight, customs clearance and logistics services, and it develops sustainable biotechnology ingredients for use in skincare formulations. Aqua Bio Technology is listed on Euronext Expand in Oslo.
